English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Lehigh Valley Railroad Company records
Lehigh Valley Railroad Company
3362
6 cubic feet. 6 cubic feet.
1870-1962. Financial records, reports, schedules and blueprints. Financial records, reports, schedules, blueprints, and other records of railway lines in central and western New York State. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 9 815 ======= 9 815 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2078497
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. E. Warren
Date completed:
October 1988
EAD encoding:
Finding aid encoded by Peter Martinez, April 2006
Date modified:
RMC Staff, December 2013
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Financial records, reports, schedules, blueprints, and other records of railway lines in central and western New York State.
Collection includes financial records (bank books, cancelled checks, check stubs, account book, assessments), reports, indentures, mortgage, tickets, schedules, newspaper clippings, blueprints, and two broadsides concerning the organization, consolidation, finance, and other business matters pertaining to the Lehigh Valley Railway; Lehigh Valley Railroad; Waverly and State Line Railway; Geneva, Ithaca and Sayre Railroad; Elmira, Cortland and Northern Railroad; Geneva and Van Ettenville Railroad; Ithaca and Athens Railroad; Geneva and Sayre Railroad; Hayts Corners, Ovid and Willard Railroad; New York, Ontario and Western Railway; Buffalo and Geneva Railway; and the New York Railroad. Also, letter files from J.F. Powers and F.E. Erdman in the Division Freight Office, Geneva, N.Y., ca. 1925-1931; locomotive log book, Manchester, N.Y., 1959; blueprints of railroad crossings used for tax assessment; ledger of Lehigh Valley-owned structures; and ledger of special franchise maps.
Cite As:
Lehigh Valley Railroad Company records, #3362. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Broadsides. Railroads -- Consolidation. Railroads -- New York (State) Erdman, F. E. Powers, J. F. Buffalo and Geneva Railway Company Elmira, Cortland and Northern Railroad Company Geneva, Ithaca and Sayre Railroad Company Geneva and Sayre Railroad Company Geneva and Van Ettenville Railroad Comapny Hayts Corners, Ovid and Willard Railway Company Ithaca and Athens Railroad Company Lehigh Valley Railway Company New York, Ontario, and Western Railway Co New York Railroad Company Waverly and State Line Rail Road Company
